summary: Job Request UI feature testing completed successfully. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in job creation endpoint. All CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete) working correctly via both API and UI.

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error when creating new job requests - 500 Internal Server Error
bugs_fixed.fix: Added job_doc.pop('_id', None) after insert_one to remove MongoDB _id before returning response

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/portal/employer/jobs - List jobs for authenticated employer
Backend: GET /api/portal/employer/jobs - Unauthenticated returns 401
Backend: POST /api/portal/employer/jobs - Create job with validated profile
Backend: POST /api/portal/employer/jobs - Fails without profile (400)
Backend: POST /api/portal/employer/jobs - Fails with unvalidated profile (400)
Backend: GET /api/portal/employer/jobs/{job_id} - Get job details
Backend: GET /api/portal/employer/jobs/{job_id} - Non-existent job returns 404
Backend: PUT /api/portal/employer/jobs/{job_id} - Update job
Backend: DELETE /api/portal/employer/jobs/{job_id} - Cancel job (status -> cancelled)
Backend: DELETE /api/portal/employer/jobs/{job_id} - Non-existent job returns 404
Backend: GET /api/portal/employer/profile - Get employer profile
Backend: GET /api/portal/employer/dashboard - Get dashboard stats
Frontend: Job list page loads at /portal/employer/jobs
Frontend: Create Job button visible when profile is validated
Frontend: Search functionality filters jobs by title, COR code, location
Frontend: Job creation form has all required fields
Frontend: Job creation via form works correctly
Frontend: Job detail/edit page loads with pre-filled data
Frontend: Dropdown menu shows Edit and Cancel options
Frontend: Cancel job confirmation dialog works
Frontend: Job status changes to 'Anulat' after cancellation
Frontend: Success toasts display correctly
critical_code_review_comments: JobRequestsList.jsx: Well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
JobRequestForm.jsx: Comprehensive form with all required fields for job creation
portal_routes.py: Job CRUD endpoints properly check profile validation status before allowing job creation
seed_data_creation: Created test jobs via API and UI for testing CRUD operations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Job Request UI feature fully tested. Routes: /portal/employer/jobs (list), /portal/employer/jobs/new (create), /portal/employer/jobs/:jobId (view/edit), /portal/employer/jobs/:jobId/edit (edit). API endpoints: GET/POST /api/portal/employer/jobs, GET/PUT/DELETE /api/portal/employer/jobs/{job_id}. Profile must be validated (status='validated') to create jobs. Delete operation changes status to 'cancelled' rather than hard delete.

features: Lists all employer jobs with status badges
Search by title, COR code, or location
Create Job button (only if profile validated)
Details button navigates to job detail
Dropdown menu with Edit and Cancel options
Pre-fills form with existing job data

profile_validation_check.behavior: Jobs cannot be created if employer profile is not validated
